org.kiwis.Station.Kafka.description: Kafka endpoint for KiWIS station reference records on the `kiwis` topic keyed by the configured KiWIS instance identifier and upstream station_id.

org.kiwis.Timeseries.Kafka.description: Kafka endpoint for KiWIS timeseries metadata and values on the `kiwis` topic keyed by the configured KiWIS instance identifier and upstream ts_id.

org.kiwis.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 endpoint for generalized KiWIS CloudEvents using a hydrology Unified Namespace topic tree.

org.kiwis.Amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 endpoint for generalized KiWIS CloudEvents on a configured queue, topic, or event hub address.

org.kiwis.station.description: Transport-neutral KiWIS station catalog events keyed by `{kiwis_id}/{station_id}`. Stations are emitted at startup and periodically refreshed before value telemetry so consumers can interpret timeseries in temporal context.

org.kiwis.Station.name: Station
org.kiwis.Station.description: Reference metadata for one observation station returned by KiWIS getStationList, including stable identifiers, public names, WGS 84 coordinates, river, and catchment context.

org.kiwis.timeseries.description: Transport-neutral KiWIS timeseries catalog and observation value events keyed by `{kiwis_id}/{ts_id}`. Timeseries metadata and values share a key because `ts_id` is the stable identity for the measured series within one KiWIS datasource.

org.kiwis.Timeseries.name: Timeseries
org.kiwis.Timeseries.description: Reference metadata for one KiWIS timeseries returned by getTimeseriesList, including station linkage, parameter labels, units, and coverage range.

org.kiwis.TimeseriesValue.name: TimeseriesValue
org.kiwis.TimeseriesValue.description: One observation row returned by KiWIS getTimeseriesValues for a configured timeseries, carrying timestamp, numeric value, optional quality code, and the per-timeseries unit metadata needed by consumers.

org.kiwis.station.kafka.description: Kafka bindings for KiWIS station events.

org.kiwis.station.mqtt.description: MQTT bindings for KiWIS station events with retained last-known-value topics.

org.kiwis.station.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 bindings for KiWIS station events.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key for stable per-entity ordering and correlation.

kiwis_id.description: Configuration-assigned KiWIS instance identifier used by AMQP subscribers to filter a shared address by upstream instance.

org.kiwis.timeseries.kafka.description: Kafka bindings for KiWIS timeseries events.

org.kiwis.timeseries.mqtt.description: MQTT bindings for KiWIS timeseries events with retained last-known-value topics.

org.kiwis.timeseries.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 bindings for KiWIS timeseries events.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key for stable per-entity ordering and correlation.

kiwis_id.description: Configuration-assigned KiWIS instance identifier used by AMQP subscribers to filter a shared address by upstream instance.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key for stable per-entity ordering and correlation.

kiwis_id.description: Configuration-assigned KiWIS instance identifier used by AMQP subscribers to filter a shared address by upstream instance.

org.kiwis.Station.name: Station

schema.name: Station

kiwis_id.description: Configuration-assigned identifier for the KiWIS endpoint/datasource. It qualifies upstream identifiers because station_id and ts_id are unique only within a KiWIS datasource.

base_url.description: Base KiWIS queryServices URL used as the CloudEvents source and as provenance for records from this instance.

station_id.description: Stable KiWIS station_id returned by getStationList. This is the station identity within one KiWIS datasource and forms the station event subject with kiwis_id.

station_no.description: Agency station number returned by getStationList. It is useful for user-facing cross-reference but is not used as the primary event key because KiWIS documents station_id as the stable query identifier.

station_name.description: Human-readable station name returned by getStationList for display, search, and map labels; not stable enough for keys.

latitude.description: Station latitude in WGS 84 decimal degrees from station_latitude; null when the upstream catalog omits coordinates.

longitude.description: Station longitude in WGS 84 decimal degrees from station_longitude; null when the upstream catalog omits coordinates.

river_name.description: River or water body name returned by KiWIS getStationList, used by consumers for hydrological grouping and map filtering.

catchment_name.description: Catchment or basin label returned by KiWIS getStationList, used for watershed-level filtering and analytics.

schema.description: Reference station payload from KiWIS getStationList with stable identifiers, optional location, river, and catchment context.

org.kiwis.Station.description: Reference station payload from KiWIS getStationList with stable identifiers, optional location, river, and catchment context.

org.kiwis.Timeseries.name: Timeseries

schema.name: Timeseries

kiwis_id.description: Configuration-assigned identifier for the KiWIS endpoint/datasource. It qualifies upstream identifiers because station_id and ts_id are unique only within a KiWIS datasource.

base_url.description: Base KiWIS queryServices URL used as the CloudEvents source and as provenance for records from this instance.

ts_id.description: Stable KiWIS timeseries identifier returned by getTimeseriesList. It is globally unique within a KiWIS datasource and forms the key for metadata and value events.

ts_name.description: Full KiWIS timeseries name such as `15minute.Total` or `Day.Mean`, describing aggregation interval and statistic.

ts_shortname.description: Short KiWIS timeseries label returned by getTimeseriesList for compact displays and diagnostics.

station_id.description: Stable station_id of the station owning this timeseries, enabling joins from timeseries metadata to station reference events.

station_name.description: Human-readable station name repeated by getTimeseriesList for operator convenience; consumers should use station_id for joins.

parametertype_name.description: KiWIS parameter type name such as level, discharge, precipitation, or temperature; identifies the physical quantity measured.

stationparameter_name.description: Station-specific parameter name returned by KiWIS, often the locally meaningful label such as Level or Rain.

unit_name.description: Per-timeseries unit name returned as ts_unitname, such as meter or millimeter. Units vary by timeseries and therefore travel as data fields rather than fixed schema units.

unit_symbol.description: Per-timeseries unit symbol returned as ts_unitsymbol, such as m, mm, m3/s, or deg C. Consumers use it to label numeric values correctly.

coverage_from.description: Start timestamp of the available coverage range reported by KiWIS getTimeseriesList. It is null when the server omits coverage.

coverage_to.description: End timestamp of the available coverage range reported by KiWIS getTimeseriesList. It is null when the server omits coverage.

schema.description: Reference timeseries payload from KiWIS getTimeseriesList with station linkage, parameter labels, units, and coverage.

org.kiwis.Timeseries.description: Reference timeseries payload from KiWIS getTimeseriesList with station linkage, parameter labels, units, and coverage.

org.kiwis.TimeseriesValue.name: TimeseriesValue

schema.name: TimeseriesValue

kiwis_id.description: Configuration-assigned identifier for the KiWIS endpoint/datasource. It qualifies upstream identifiers because station_id and ts_id are unique only within a KiWIS datasource.

base_url.description: Base KiWIS queryServices URL used as the CloudEvents source and as provenance for records from this instance.

ts_id.description: Stable KiWIS timeseries identifier returned by getTimeseriesList. It is globally unique within a KiWIS datasource and forms the key for metadata and value events.

station_id.description: Stable station_id of the station owning this timeseries, enabling joins from timeseries metadata to station reference events.

timestamp.description: Observation timestamp from the Timestamp column returned by getTimeseriesValues, parsed as an instant in UTC when the upstream string ends in Z.

value.description: Numeric observation value from the Value column. It can be null for missing or censored measurements; use unit_name and unit_symbol to interpret magnitude.

quality_code.description: Optional KiWIS Quality Code column value. KiWIS instances use this integer to convey quality, approval, or processing flags; null means the response omitted the column or row value.

unit_name.description: Per-timeseries unit name returned as ts_unitname, such as meter or millimeter. Units vary by timeseries and therefore travel as data fields rather than fixed schema units.

unit_symbol.description: Per-timeseries unit symbol returned as ts_unitsymbol, such as m, mm, m3/s, or deg C. Consumers use it to label numeric values correctly.

parametertype_name.description: KiWIS parameter type name such as level, discharge, precipitation, or temperature; identifies the physical quantity measured.

stationparameter_name.description: Station-specific parameter name returned by KiWIS, often the locally meaningful label such as Level or Rain.

schema.description: Telemetry payload for one KiWIS getTimeseriesValues row with value, quality code, and unit metadata copied from the timeseries catalog.

org.kiwis.TimeseriesValue.description: Telemetry payload for one KiWIS getTimeseriesValues row with value, quality code, and unit metadata copied from the timeseries catalog.

schema.doc: Reference station payload from KiWIS getStationList.

fields.name: station_no
fields.doc: Agency station number returned by getStationList. It is useful for user-facing cross-reference but is not used as the primary event key because KiWIS documents station_id as the stable query identifier.

fields.name: longitude

fields.name: catchment_name
fields.doc: Catchment or basin label returned by KiWIS getStationList, used for watershed-level filtering and analytics.
